results.title: FPGA Design Engineer
results.description: We are looking for an FPGA Design Engineer to join our team. You will work on VHDL and Verilog designs for high-performance computing applications. Salary: £40,000 - £50,000 per year. Closing date: 30 June 2026.

results.title: Embedded Software Engineer
results.description: Join our embedded C team working on next-generation SoC firmware. Requirements: 2+ years embedded C, RTOS experience preferred. Salary competitive. Apply by 15 July 2026.
